response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack web/mobile developer but the profile does not align with a Principal Performance Architect role centered on SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware, and deep-learning workload optimization. There is no evidence of GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD work, DNN training/inference optimization, or hardware-software co-design at the level required. Educational background (BS CS) without the specialized hardware experience falls short of the principal-IC bar for this domain.
strengths: Long tenure as senior IC with experience across multiple languages including C/C++ and DLang
Some low-latency systems work at Dunnhumby handling high-throughput HTTP services
Brief embedded/hardware-adjacent exposure at National Instruments (LabWindows/CVI)
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, or AI accelerator experience
No deep neural network training/inference optimization background
Career is web/full-stack focused, not hardware-software co-design or system architecture for AI

key_factors.factor: Missing AI accelerator / SoC modeling expertise
No DNN workload or GPU architecture experience
Some C/C++ and low-latency systems exposure
